hero.headline: Expert Auto Repair You Can Trust in Dallas
hero.subheadline: From routine maintenance to major repairs, our certified technicians deliver quality workmanship and honest advice. Experience the Alfred's difference.

featureSections.title: Honest Diagnostics & Upfront Pricing
featureSections.body: We believe in clear communication. Every repair comes with a detailed estimate and explanation before any work begins. No hidden fees, no surprises.
featureSections.cardBody: All repairs are backed by our comprehensive warranty, so you drive away confident.

featureSections.title: Expert Care for All Makes & Models
featureSections.body: Our ASE-certified mechanics use the latest diagnostic equipment to service domestic and import vehicles. We stay current with training to handle everything from oil changes to engine rebuilds.
featureSections.cardBody: We use only high-quality parts that meet or exceed manufacturer specifications, ensuring longevity and performance.

cta.headline: Ready for Reliable Auto Repair?
cta.subheadline: Schedule your appointment today and experience the Alfred's difference.

servicesPage.intro: From routine oil changes to complex engine repairs, our certified technicians provide comprehensive auto care for all makes and models. Every service is backed by our commitment to quality and transparency.

services.title: Engine Diagnostics & Repair
services.shortDescription: Advanced diagnostic testing and expert engine repair to restore performance and reliability.
services.longDescription: Using state-of-the-art diagnostic equipment, our technicians pinpoint issues quickly and accurately. Whether it's a check engine light, rough idling, or loss of power, we provide thorough analysis and lasting repairs.

process.title: Computer Scan
process.description: Connect advanced scanners to read error codes and live data.

process.title: Physical Inspection
process.description: Thoroughly inspect engine components to confirm the issue.

process.title: Repair & Test
process.description: Perform necessary repairs and test drive to ensure proper function.

faqs.question: How long does an engine diagnostic take?
faqs.answer: Most diagnostics are completed within one hour, depending on complexity.

faqs.question: Do you offer warranty on engine repairs?
faqs.answer: Yes, all engine repairs come with a comprehensive warranty for your peace of mind.

services.title: Brake Service & Repair
services.shortDescription: Complete brake inspections, pad replacement, rotor resurfacing, and caliper repair.
services.longDescription: Your safety depends on reliable brakes. We inspect every component — pads, rotors, calipers, lines, and fluid — to ensure optimal stopping power. We use premium parts and precision techniques.

process.title: Brake Inspection
process.description: Measure pad thickness, rotor condition, and fluid level.

process.title: Component Replacement
process.description: Replace worn pads, resurface or replace rotors as needed.

process.title: System Test
process.description: Test brake function and bleed system to remove air.

faqs.question: How often should I replace brake pads?
faqs.answer: Typically every 30,000–50,000 miles, but it depends on driving habits.

faqs.question: What are signs of brake trouble?
faqs.answer: Squealing, grinding, vibration, or a soft brake pedal indicate it's time for an inspection.

services.title: Oil Change & Preventive Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Regular oil changes and multi-point inspections to keep your engine running smoothly.
services.longDescription: Preventive maintenance is the key to a long-lasting vehicle. Our oil change service includes high-quality oil and filter, plus a free multi-point inspection to catch small issues before they become big problems.

process.title: Oil Drain & Filter Change
process.description: Drain old oil, replace filter, and refill with fresh oil.

process.title: Multi-Point Inspection
process.description: Check belts, hoses, fluids, tires, and battery.

process.title: Report & Recommendations
process.description: Provide a detailed report with any recommended services.

faqs.question: What type of oil do you use?
faqs.answer: We use high-quality conventional and synthetic oils to meet your vehicle's specifications.

faqs.question: How often should I get an oil change?
faqs.answer: Every 3,000–5,000 miles for conventional oil, or up to 7,500 miles for synthetic.

services.title: AC & Heating System Repair
services.shortDescription: Expert diagnosis and repair for your vehicle's air conditioning and heating systems.
services.longDescription: Stay comfortable year-round with a fully functioning HVAC system. Our technicians are trained to diagnose and repair all AC and heating components, from compressors to blend doors.
benefits: Elimination of unusual odors or noises

process.title: System Inspection
process.description: Check refrigerant levels, compressor function, and cabin air filter.

process.title: Leak Detection
process.description: Use electronic leak detectors and UV dye to find leaks.

process.title: Repair & Recharge
process.description: Replace faulty components and recharge system to manufacturer specs.

faqs.question: Why is my AC blowing warm air?
faqs.answer: Common causes include low refrigerant, a faulty compressor, or a leak in the system.

faqs.question: How often should I service my car's AC?
faqs.answer: We recommend an AC check every two years or if you notice reduced performance.

about.headline: Your Trusted Dallas Auto Repair Since 1995
about.mission: To provide honest, high-quality auto repair services that keep our community safe on the road.
story: Alfred's Auto Services Center was founded in 1995 by Alfred Martinez, a master mechanic with a vision to create a repair shop that prioritized integrity and customer education. Starting with a small two-bay garage on Lawnview Avenue, Alfred built a reputation for thorough diagnostics, fair pricing, and work that lasted. Word spread quickly among Dallas residents who were tired of being upsold on unnecessary repairs.

Over the years, the shop has grown into a full-service facility with a team of ASE-certified technicians. Despite the expansion, Alfred's commitment to transparency and community remains unchanged. We treat every customer like a neighbor, explaining each repair in plain language and offering options that fit their budget. Today, we're proud to be one of Dallas's most trusted auto repair centers.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We always tell you what your car needs — and what it doesn't.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: Every repair is performed to the highest standards using premium parts.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We support our local community and treat every customer like family.

coreValues.title: Expertise
coreValues.description: Continuous training and advanced tools ensure we stay ahead of automotive technology.

contact.headline: Get in Touch with Alfred's Auto
contact.subheadline: Ready to schedule service or have a question? We're here to help.
